eas_text: A civil authority has issued A HAZARDOUS MATERIALS WARNING for the following counties or areas: Siskiyou, CA; at 01:18 PM ON MAR 17, 2026 Effective until 09:18 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
***For passenger vehicles only*** 

North Bound Traffic Reroute due to road closure on Hwy 97 in Dorris. Alternate Route: From Northbound Hwy97, Turn East on Shady Dell Rd, North on E. Butte Vly Rd, North on Dorris/Brown Rd, North on Center St to Hwy 97.

*** Passenger Vehicles Only ***
